steps.title: Identify what needs emphasizing
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes when Goldwasser won the award. The notes provide the key timing detail: “in 2012.” To emphasize this detail, the correct choice must place it in a focal position, not bury it as a supporting clause or background information.

steps.title: Apply the emphasis test to the choices
steps.content:
B restructures the information as “It was in 2012 that Shafi Goldwasser won the A.M.

Turing Award,” placing the year at the front for emphasis.
  • A emphasizes the reason for the award (the transformative work)
  • C merely identifies her as a winner without timing
  • D provides only background on the award itself
.

B alone makes the year the focal point. That matches choice B — B is correct.
